  • Uses of LogEntry in at.jku.se.smarthome.service.api

    Methods in at.jku.se.smarthome.service.api that return types with arguments of type LogEntry
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    javafx.collections.ObservableList<LogEntry>
    LogService.getLogs()
    Returns all log entries, most recent first.
    javafx.collections.ObservableList<LogEntry>
    LogService.getLogsByActor(String actor)
    Returns log entries filtered by actor.
    javafx.collections.ObservableList<LogEntry>
    LogService.getLogsByDevice(String device)
    Returns log entries filtered by device name.
    javafx.collections.ObservableList<LogEntry>
    LogService.getLogsByRoom(String room)
    Returns log entries filtered by room name.
    Method parameters in at.jku.se.smarthome.service.api with type arguments of type LogEntry
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    LogService.exportToCSV(List<LogEntry> entries)
    Exports the supplied log entries as a CSV string.
